sections.title: Base
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo, Blue Velocity (Multi-Pack), Checkerboard*, Hyper Pink (Walmart Mega Box), Purple*, Shock (Target Mega Box), Orange #/199, Lime Green #/149, Red #/99, Pink Velocity #/79, Blue #/49, Black Velocity #/39, Pink #/25, Purple Stars FOTL #/13, Gold #/10, Green #/5, Black 1/1, Gold Vinyl 1/1. · *Purple/Checkerboard parallels exclusive to Blaster, Multi-Pack, Target Mega Box.* · CHOICE PARALLELS: Dragon, Red #/88, Black Gold #/8, Nebula 1/1. · FAST BREAK PARALLELS: Holo, Purple #/95, Red #/85, Blue #/50, Pink #/20, Gold #/10, Black 1/1. · **There is a separate Premium Box Set version #/249.**
